name: Love Advisor
original_name: เพื่อนทัก...ว่ารักนะ
overview: Follows a guy who can predict a person’s future by patterns of tea leaves. Our fortune teller is in love with his best friend, but unfortunately, he’s stuck as a love advisor for said friend.

trailers.title: Teaser 1 :: Love Advisor "เพื่อนทัก...ว่ารักนะ"
